name: Tarragon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken breasts and place them in a ziploc freezer bag.
2. Freeze the chicken breasts.
3. To prepare: thaw the chicken breasts completely before cooking.
4. Arrange the chicken, meaty sides up, in an ungreased rectangular 13X9X2 baking dish.
5. Sprinkle with paprika.
6. Place zucchini (cut into halves and then into 2-inch pieces), carrots (cut into 1/4-inch slices), and mushrooms around and over the chicken.
7. Mix the remaining ingredients: butter or margarine, lemon juice, tarragon, salt, and pepper.
8. Drizzle the mixture over the chicken and vegetables.
9. Cover and cook in a 350-degree oven until the chicken is done, about 50 to 60 minutes.
Serving Ideas:
Steamed Rice, Green Salad
